reviews.comment:
Los baños muy bien, pero en un ingreso a San Juan cerrado el servicio de confitería, ni para comprar agua caliente, una lastima que el gobierno no ayude en estas cosas, y quieren hacer turismo, así es imposible, igual el ingreso a San Juan , ninguna cartelera clara, ruta no demacrada carteleria casi inexistente, si que NO TIENEN NI LA MENOR IDEA DE HACER TURISMO

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were fine, but at the entrance to San Juan, the confectionery service was closed, not even for buying hot water. It's a shame the government doesn't help with these things, and they want to promote tourism; it's impossible like this. Similarly, at the entrance to San Juan, there are no clear signs, the road is dilapidated, and signage is almost nonexistent. They clearly have no idea how to manage tourism.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXc0llMmF3EAE
